signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Kickers with this ability experience a slower kicking meter for better power and accuracy on kicks over 45 yards.
Kickers with this ability experience a slower kicking meter for better power and accuracy on kicks up to 45 yards.
Kickers with this ability can see the entirety of the kicking arc
Defenders with this ability will ignore one bar of blocker resistance when attempting spin pass rush moves
Defenders with this ability are refunded stamina when they successfully shed blocks
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Aggressive receivers overpower defenders and attack the football. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on aggressive catches against single coverage.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
When lined up in the slot, receivers with this ability make faster cuts and have better hands when catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable spin animations.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus short routes less than 10 yards from LoS
